description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a gable roof and a modern, open layout. The front facade features large windows and a prominent entryway, flanked by two tall palm trees and surrounded by a landscaped yard. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and additional greenery, including smaller shrubs and decorative plants. The side views reveal a mix of window sizes and a clear separation between the main living area and the outdoor spaces, with a visible driveway or walkway on one side. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, with a combination of smooth wall surfaces and glass elements. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, with multiple access points to the garden and patio.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings featuring palm trees and a spacious patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and two tall palm trees framing the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, a driveway or walkway, and a mix of window sizes along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open patio area, outdoor seating, and lush landscaping with smaller plants.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional windows, a visible entry path, and palm trees at the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows
